body:
## Summary
- Collapse older same-agent orchestrator handoff marker comments after a successful dispatch.
- Reuse the existing generated-comment minimizer and AGENT_COLLAPSE_OLD_REVIEWS toggle.
- Update orchestrator workflow env, docs, and focused regression tests.

## Verification
- `npm --prefix .agent run build`
- `node --test .agent/dist/__tests__/review-summary-minimize.test.js .agent/dist/__tests__/orchestrate-handoff-cli.test.js .agent/dist/__tests__/envelope.test.js`
- `git diff --check`

Closes #59

comments.body:
Sepo automation handoff dispatched: `implement` -> `review` (round 3/10).

agent planner selected review: Implementation succeeded and produced PR #60 for issue #59; no review synthesis exists yet, so an automated review is the appropriate next action.

<!-- sepo-agent-handoff state:dispatched created:1777531597938 base64:aGFuZG9mZjpzZWxmLWV2b2x2aW5nL3JlcG86MjUxNTEzMzQwNDk6aW1wbGVtZW50OjU5OnJldmlldzo2MDoz -->

## Rubrics Review

| Total Score | Verdict | Rubrics Scored |
| -- | -- | -- |
| 100 | PASS | 7 |

| Dimension | Rubric | Result | Score | Evidence |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
| coding_workflow / generic | Reuse existing code | pass | 8/8 | Reuses `.agent/src/review-summary-minimize.ts` and extends the existing minimization path instead of creating separate workflow glue. |
| coding_workflow / generic | Keep docs in sync | pass | 7/7 | Updates supported workflows, configuration list, and orchestrator technical docs for handoff comment cleanup and `AGENT_COLLAPSE_OLD_REVIEWS`. |
| coding_workflow / generic | Read docs and linked context first | pass | 6/6 | PR closes #59, whose accepted plan explicitly referenced #57/#11 and the existing cleanup helper; implementation follows that plan. |
| coding_workflow / generic | Make surgical changes | pass | 8/8 | Changes are limited to orchestrator handoff cleanup, the shared minimizer, focused tests, workflow env wiring, and matching docs. |
| coding_style / generic | Prefer simple implementations | pass | 7/7 | Adds a small handoff marker matcher plus issue/PR comment minimization reuse; no new subsystem or complex configuration. |
| coding_workflow / generic | Surface stateful failures | pass | 7/7 | Cleanup failure is surfaced with a warning while preserving successful dispatch; regression test covers the non-blocking failure path. |
| coding_workflow / generic | No per-file inventory tables in docs | pass | 6/6 | Docs update behavior descriptions only; no stale-prone per-file inventory table was added. |

## Notes

- The strongest rubric alignment is reuse: the PR generalizes the existing generated-comment minimizer and gates handoff cleanup with the existing `AGENT_COLLAPSE_OLD_REVIEWS` toggle.
- Focused tests cover issue handoff cleanup, PR target cleanup, toggle-off behavior, current marker exclusion, and cleanup failure after dispatch.
- No rubric-specific follow-up needed.

## Findings

- **INFO:** No rubric-specific violations found.

## Final Rubric Verdict

PASS

## AI Review Synthesis

<!-- sepo-agent-review-synthesis -->

> Dual-agent review by **Claude** and **Codex**.
> Requested by @lolipopshock.

## Summary of PR/Issue
- PR #60 addresses issue #59 by collapsing older orchestrator handoff marker comments after a successful dispatch.
- The implementation reuses the existing generated-comment minimization path and extends `AGENT_COLLAPSE_OLD_REVIEWS` to cover orchestrator handoff comments.
- It updates workflow env wiring, docs, and focused tests for issue/PR handoff comment cleanup, disabled cleanup, and non-blocking cleanup failure.
- The broader goal is to keep the newest agent status visible without leaving prior generated handoff comments prominent.

## Review
- Overall, the PR is close and follows the requested design, but one edge case can hide an active or newer handoff marker on the same target.
- I posted one inline comment on `.agent/src/review-summary-minimize.ts` line 322 for the concrete issue.

| Issue | Severity | Description |
| -- | -- | -- |
| Cleanup can minimize active/non-previous handoff markers | WARNING | The cleanup excludes only the current marker ID, while the matcher accepts `pending`, `failed`, and `dispatched` markers. A concurrent or newer same-agent handoff on the same target could be minimized as outdated even if it is still active. |

## Progress
- Rubrics review passed with no rubric-specific violations.
- Review verification reported passing `npm --prefix .agent run build`, targeted `node --test` coverage, and `git diff --check`.
- Existing PR discussion did not already cover the active-marker cleanup edge case, so an inline comment was posted.

## Issue Details

<details>
<summary>Cleanup can minimize active/non-previous handoff markers</summary>

**Cause:** `collapsePreviousHandoffComments` uses a broad handoff marker matcher, then filters out only `excludeCommentId`. Because the matcher accepts `pending`, `failed`, and `dispatched`, any other same-agent marker on the target can be minimized without checking whether it is actually older or inactive.

**Candidate solutions:** Parse marker `state` and `createdAt` and minimize only markers older than the current marker, or at minimum skip `pending` markers so active orchestration status remains visible. Add focused regression coverage for a pending or newer handoff marker on the same target.

**Comments:** Normal sequential handoffs should work, but this behavior is broader than the documented “older/previous” cleanup contract.

</details>

## Recommended Next Step
FIX_PR: The remaining issue is a concrete branch change with a narrow testable fix, suitable for an automated fix-pr pass.

## Final Verdict
MINOR_ISSUES

## Action Items
- [ ] Restrict handoff cleanup so it does not minimize pending or newer/non-previous handoff markers on the same target.

Sepo automation handoff dispatched: `review` -> `fix-pr` (round 4/10).

agent planner selected fix-pr: Latest review synthesis recommends FIX_PR for a concrete MINOR_ISSUES finding: handoff cleanup can minimize pending or newer same-agent markers on the same target.

<!-- sepo-agent-handoff state:dispatched created:1777531956752 base64:aGFuZG9mZjpzZWxmLWV2b2x2aW5nL3JlcG86MjUxNTE1MTQzNDk6cmV2aWV3OjYwOmZpeF9wcjo2MDo0 -->

**Sepo pushed fixes for this PR.** Branch: `agent/implement-issue-59/codex-25151334049`. Requested by @sepo-agent.

- Restricted orchestrator handoff cleanup to skip pending markers and only collapse markers older than the current handoff when a current timestamp is available.
- Preserved the current handoff marker creation timestamp through the dispatched update and passed it into cleanup.
- Added focused regression coverage for pending and newer same-target handoff markers.
- Verification passed: `npm --prefix .agent run build`, targeted `node --test ...`, and `git diff --check`.

Sepo automation handoff dispatched: `fix-pr` -> `review` (round 5/10).

agent planner selected review: fix-pr succeeded after the latest review synthesis recommended FIX_PR for a concrete MINOR_ISSUES finding; a follow-up automated review is warranted to verify the branch change.

<!-- sepo-agent-handoff state:dispatched created:1777532167425 base64:aGFuZG9mZjpzZWxmLWV2b2x2aW5nL3JlcG86MjUxNTE3MjY0OTY6Zml4X3ByOjYwOnJldmlldzo2MDo1 -->

## Rubrics Review

| Total Score | Verdict | Rubrics Scored |
| -- | -- | -- |
| 100 | PASS | 7 |

| Dimension | Rubric | Result | Score | Evidence |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
| coding_workflow / generic | Reuse existing code | pass | 8/8 | Reuses and extends the existing generated-comment minimizer in [review-summary-minimize.ts](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/b2a2820d347ce312c9d2c9f6747becf9914d06eb/.agent/src/review-summary-minimize.ts) instead of adding separate workflow-only cleanup logic. |
| coding_workflow / generic | Keep docs in sync | pass | 7/7 | Updates supported workflows, configuration docs, and orchestrator technical docs for orchestrator handoff cleanup and `AGENT_COLLAPSE_OLD_REVIEWS`. |
| coding_workflow / generic | Read docs and linked context first | pass | 6/6 | PR closes #59, whose plan explicitly referenced #57/#11 and asked to reuse the existing cleanup pattern; the implementation follows that accepted plan. |
| coding_workflow / generic | Make surgical changes | pass | 8/8 | Diff is limited to handoff marker parsing, minimizer reuse, orchestrator env/CLI wiring, focused tests, and related docs. |
| coding_style / generic | Prefer simple implementations | pass | 7/7 | Adds a small handoff-marker matcher and cleanup filter using existing GraphQL minimization helpers; no new subsystem or broad configuration surface. |
| coding_workflow / generic | Surface stateful failures | pass | 7/7 | Cleanup failures are logged as warnings without persisting a misleading clean state or blocking successful dispatch; regression coverage checks this path. |
| coding_workflow / generic | No per-file inventory tables in docs | pass | 6/6 | Documentation describes behavior and configuration only; it does not add stale-prone per-file inventory tables. |

## Notes

- The PR aligns strongly with the selected rubrics: it follows the linked issue plan, reuses existing minimization infrastructure, keeps docs updated, and adds focused regression tests.
- The prior review warning about minimizing pending or newer handoff markers appears addressed in the current diff by skipping `pending` markers and comparing marker creation timestamps.
- No rubric-specific follow-up needed.

## Findings

- **INFO:** No rubric-specific violations found.

## Final Rubric Verdict

PASS

## AI Review Synthesis

<!-- sepo-agent-review-synthesis -->

> Dual-agent review by **Claude** and **Codex**.
> Requested by @lolipopshock.

## Summary of PR/Issue
- PR #60 addresses issue #59 by collapsing older orchestrator handoff marker comments after a successful dispatch.
- It reuses the existing generated-comment minimization path and extends `AGENT_COLLAPSE_OLD_REVIEWS` to cover orchestrator handoff comments.
- The PR also updates workflow env wiring, docs, and focused tests for issue/PR cleanup, disabled cleanup, and non-blocking cleanup failure.
- A prior review warning about minimizing active or newer handoff markers was followed by a fix-pr pass.

## Review
The current reviewer inputs agree that the PR is ready. The earlier active-marker concern appears resolved by skipping `pending` markers and only minimizing markers older than the current handoff timestamp.

| Issue | Severity | Description |
| -- | -- | -- |
| No actionable issues | INFO | The current review and rubrics review found no remaining blocking, warning, or required branch-change issues. |

## Progress
- Earlier synthesis flagged that cleanup could minimize pending or newer same-agent handoff markers.
- A fix-pr pass updated the branch to skip pending markers and compare marker creation timestamps.
- The latest Codex review reports `npm --prefix .agent run build`, targeted `node --test`, and `git diff --check` all passed.
- Rubrics review passed, including reuse of existing code, docs kept in sync, surgical scope, and surfaced cleanup failures.

## Recommended Next Step
NO_AUTOMATED_ACTION: No unresolved actionable branch changes remain from the available reviews.

## Final Verdict
SHIP

## Action Items
- [ ] No required branch-change work remains.

title: Collapse old orchestrator handoff comments
